hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.dart ]]; then dart format "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; }
jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *_test.dart ]]; then flutter test "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; }
